text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 385 

PRE_ICL_MONPP_COPAY_2M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Mail Order Non-Preferred Pharmacy Copay for 2-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a day’s supply of the drugs (other 
than 1- or 3-months) on this tier, using mail order non-preferred pharmacy (MONPP) during the pre-
initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit.
